sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69524" key="muxo/pedon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῠχό-πεδον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n69524.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the depth of the earth, the abyss</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
